title: Urgent Opening Financial Analyst at Fyers South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Financial Analyst at Fyers South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Fyers South Asia Partners! We are hiring a Financial Analyst for our Pimpri-Chinchwad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Fyers South Asia Partners:
Fyers South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Fyers South Asia Partners!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
